ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for patient login */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family medical history */,
  "lifestyle" TEXT /* Lifestyle habits (e.g., diet, exercise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare professional */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for healthcare professional login */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare professional */,
  "hospital" TEXT /* Hospital where the healthcare professional is affiliated */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the healthcare professional */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the healthcare professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health risk */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the health risk */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health risk */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms associated with the health risk */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Possible complications of the health risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_health_risks" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date the risk was assessed */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health risk */,
  "points_max" INTEGER /* Maximum points possible for the assessment */,
  "points_achived" INTEGER /* Points achieved by the patient */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecast of the risk */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion for the patient */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who performed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES health_risks ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_hcp_assignments" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the healthcare professional was assigned to the patient */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care physician, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_options" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment option */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health risk */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment option */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Treatment duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_options_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES health_risks ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment option */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "adherence" REAL /* Patient adherence to the treatment (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_risk_symptoms" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health risk */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id", "symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "kb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base entry */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health risk */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge base entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES health_risk_symptoms ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment_options ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES health_risks ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the progress entry */,
  "points_achived" INTEGER /* Points achieved by the patient */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who recorded the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_progress_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_progress_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the machine learning model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment result */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score predicted by the model */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the patient logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagement_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
